## Problem

What problem would this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the API, CLI behavior, data format, or workflow you want.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope

- [ ] Calendar / Ganzhi helper
- [ ] Bazi chart logic
- [ ] Ziwei chart logic
- [ ] Dataset / schema
- [ ] CLI / developer tooling
- [ ] LLM benchmark runner
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context

Links, examples, references, or sample data.
